query:
insert into TestCaseOverrides (
                                last_collect_nr,
                                product_id,
                                test_run_name,
                                test_run_date,
                                test_case_name,
                                review_name,
                                review_date,
                                state,
                                comment_hash
                            )
                            values (
                                $1,
                                $2,
                                $3,
                                $4,
                                $5,
                                $6,
                                $7,
                                $8,
                                $9
                            )
                            on conflict (
                                product_id,
                                test_run_name,
                                test_run_date,
                                test_case_name,
                                review_name,
                                review_date
                            )
                            do update set
                                last_collect_nr = excluded.last_collect_nr,
                                state = excluded.state,
                                comment_hash = excluded.comment_hash
